title: Apollo Series 65 Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
Apollo Series 65 conventional optical smoke detector for commercial fire systems. Chamber design reduces false alarms from dust and insects. Compatible with Series 65 mounting bases. EN 54-7 approved.

  • Conventional optical (photoelectric) sensing
  • Series 65 family — widely stocked spares
  • LED alarm indication
  • Suitable for offices, corridors and residential common areas
image_label: Apollo Series 65 white optical smoke detector

title: Apollo Series 65 Ionisation Smoke Detector
body_html:
Apollo Series 65 conventional ionisation smoke detector for fast response to flaming fires. Use where optical detection is less suitable. Requires appropriate base and complies with EN 54-7.

  • Ionisation chamber sensing
  • Series 65 conventional range
  • LED status indication
  • Trade replacement for existing Series 65 systems

title: Apollo Orbis Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
Apollo Orbis conventional optical smoke detector with modern low-profile design and drift compensation. Ideal for new conventional installations and Orbis-family upgrades. EN 54-7.

  • Optical smoke sensing with drift compensation
  • Orbis conventional platform
  • Fast fit base system
  • Low profile white housing
image_label: Apollo Orbis optical smoke detector low profile

title: Apollo Orbis Multisensor Smoke Detector
body_html:
Apollo Orbis conventional multisensor smoke detector combining optical smoke with heat sensing for improved false-alarm immunity. Suited to retail, hotel and light industrial conventional systems.

  • Optical + heat multisensor conventional device
  • Orbis family form factor
  • Improved immunity to nuisance alarms
  • EN 54 compliant sensing

title: Apollo XP95 Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
Apollo XP95 addressable optical smoke detector for analogue addressable fire alarm loops. Digital communications with XP95/Discovery-compatible panels. EN 54-7 approved for commercial buildings.

  • Addressable optical smoke
  • XP95 protocol
  • Remote LED capability via base
  • Widely used UK commercial standard
image_label: Apollo XP95 addressable optical smoke detector

title: Apollo XP95 Ionisation Smoke Detector
body_html:
Apollo XP95 addressable ionisation smoke detector for flaming fire response on analogue addressable systems. Compatible with XP95 loop protocol and standard XP95 bases.

  • Addressable ionisation sensing
  • XP95 digital communications
  • LED alarm indication
  • Service spare for existing XP95 estates

title: Apollo Discovery Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
Apollo Discovery addressable optical smoke detector with advanced drift management and selectable sensitivity modes via Discovery protocol. Preferred for high-spec commercial and multi-occupancy sites.

  • Discovery protocol optical smoke
  • Selectable response modes
  • Superior drift compensation
  • EN 54-7 approved

title: Apollo Discovery Ionisation Smoke Detector
body_html:
Apollo Discovery addressable ionisation smoke detector for applications needing rapid flaming-fire response with Discovery-level diagnostics and mode selection.

  • Discovery ionisation chamber
  • Addressable loop device
  • Mode-selectable response
  • Compatible with Discovery bases

title: Hochiki ESP ALG-EN Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
Hochiki ESP ALG-EN addressable photoelectric smoke detector. Low-profile ESP protocol device widely specified on UK Hochiki loops. High reliability with chamber monitoring.

  • ESP addressable optical smoke
  • ALG-EN model
  • Low current draw
  • EN 54-7 approved
image_label: Hochiki ESP ALG-EN optical smoke detector

title: Hochiki ESP ALA-E Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
Hochiki ESP ALA-E addressable optical smoke detector for ESP protocol fire systems. Reliable photoelectric sensing for offices, hotels and multi-residential common areas.

  • ESP loop optical smoke
  • Compact white housing
  • Remote indicator support via base
  • Trade stock for Hochiki ESP estates

title: Hochiki CDX SLR-E Conventional Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
Hochiki CDX conventional optical smoke detector for two-wire conventional zones. Cost-effective photoelectric sensing for small commercial and landlord systems. EN 54-7.

  • Conventional optical smoke
  • CDX / conventional Hochiki range
  • Compatible with YBN-R/6 style bases
  • UK trade favourite for conventional panels

title: System Sensor ECO1003 Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
System Sensor ECO1003 conventional optical smoke detector. Economical photoelectric unit for conventional fire alarm zones in commercial and light industrial premises.

  • Conventional optical sensing
  • ECO1000 series
  • Low-profile design
  • EN 54-7 approved
image_label: System Sensor ECO1003 optical smoke detector

title: System Sensor ECO1002 Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
System Sensor ECO1002 conventional photoelectric smoke detector for budget-conscious conventional installations. Simple bayonet base fit and stable optical chamber performance.

  • Entry-level conventional optical smoke
  • ECO1000 family
  • Bayonet base mounting
  • Ideal for small commercial systems

title: System Sensor 2251EM Addressable Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
System Sensor 2251EM addressable optical smoke detector for intelligent fire alarm loops. Photoelectric sensing with remote LED option. Suitable for commercial addressable systems using System Sensor protocol.

  • Addressable optical smoke
  • Intelligent protocol communications
  • Drift compensation
  • EN 54-7

title: Fike Twinflex Multipoint Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
Fike Twinflex multipoint detector configured for optical smoke detection on Twinflex two-wire systems. Combines detection with optional sounder functions depending on head/base selection.

  • Twinflex multipoint optical mode
  • Two-wire conventional / hybrid platform
  • Compatible with Fike Twinflex panels
  • Popular for small commercial upgrades

title: Fike Sita Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
Fike Sita addressable optical smoke detector for Sita protocol loops. Reliable photoelectric sensing for commercial and multi-occupancy buildings using Fike addressable control equipment.

  • Sita addressable optical smoke
  • Loop-powered communications
  • LED status indication
  • EN 54-7 approved
image_label: Fike Sita addressable optical smoke detector

title: Apollo Series 65 Integrating Ionisation Smoke Detector
body_html:
Apollo Series 65 integrating ionisation smoke detector for conventional systems where a slightly delayed integrating response reduces nuisance alarms while retaining flaming-fire sensitivity.

  • Integrating ionisation conventional detector
  • Series 65 platform
  • Reduced false-alarm tendency vs standard ion
  • EN 54-7

title: Apollo XP95 Optical Smoke Detector — Black
body_html:
Apollo XP95 addressable optical smoke detector in black housing for architecturally sensitive or dark-ceiling installations. Full XP95 protocol compatibility.

  • Black XP95 optical smoke

  • Matches black XP95 bases and ancillaries
  • EN 54-7
image_label: Apollo XP95 black optical smoke detector

title: Hochiki ESP ALG-ENW Optical Smoke Detector (White)
body_html:
Hochiki ESP ALG-ENW white addressable optical smoke detector. Standard finish for most UK commercial installations on ESP loops.

image_label: Hochiki ALG-ENW white optical smoke detector

title: System Sensor 22051E Intelligent Optical Smoke Detector
body_html:
System Sensor 22051E intelligent addressable optical smoke detector with enhanced signal processing for commercial addressable fire systems. Photoelectric chamber with drift compensation.

  • Intelligent optical smoke
  • Enhanced false-alarm algorithms
  • Addressable loop device
  • EN 54-7 approved

title: Apollo Series 65 Heat Detector A1R (Rate-of-Rise)
body_html:
Apollo Series 65 conventional A1R rate-of-rise heat detector for kitchens, plant rooms and dusty areas where smoke detection is unsuitable. EN 54-5 Class A1R.

  • Rate-of-rise + fixed temperature Class A1R
  • Series 65 conventional
  • Ideal for kitchens and boiler rooms
  • Compatible with Series 65 bases

title: Apollo Series 65 Heat Detector BR (Rate-of-Rise)
body_html:
Apollo Series 65 conventional BR rate-of-rise heat detector for higher ambient temperature zones. EN 54-5 Class BR for plant and industrial spaces.

  • Class BR rate-of-rise heat
  • Series 65 conventional range
  • Higher ambient tolerance than A1R
  • EN 54-5 approved

title: Apollo Series 65 Heat Detector CS (Static)
body_html:
Apollo Series 65 conventional CS static (fixed temperature) heat detector. Fixed-threshold response for environments with rapid temperature fluctuations that would trip rate-of-rise devices.

  • Class CS fixed-temperature heat
  • Conventional Series 65
  • Suitable for garages and plant areas
  • EN 54-5
image_label: Apollo Series 65 CS static heat detector

title: Apollo Orbis Heat Detector A1R
body_html:
Apollo Orbis conventional A1R heat detector with modern Orbis styling. Rate-of-rise plus fixed element for kitchens, laundry rooms and dusty environments on conventional systems.

  • Low-profile conventional design
  • Fast-fit Orbis base
  • EN 54-5 Class A1R

title: Apollo Orbis Heat Detector CS
body_html:

  • Conventional two-wire zones

title: Apollo XP95 Heat Detector A1R
body_html:
Apollo XP95 addressable A1R heat detector for analogue addressable loops. Rate-of-rise Class A1R sensing for kitchens, plant rooms and areas unsuitable for smoke detection.

  • XP95 addressable A1R heat
  • Analogue value reporting
  • Compatible with XP95 bases
  • EN 54-5 Class A1R

title: Apollo XP95 Heat Detector CS
body_html:
Apollo XP95 addressable CS static heat detector. Fixed-temperature Class CS for high or fluctuating ambient areas on XP95 loops.

  • XP95 CS fixed heat
  • Addressable communications

  • EN 54-5

title: Apollo Discovery Heat Detector A1R
body_html:
Apollo Discovery addressable A1R heat detector with selectable sensitivity modes. Premium heat detection for Discovery protocol systems in commercial buildings.

  • Discovery A1R heat
  • Mode-selectable response

title: Apollo Discovery Heat Detector CS
body_html:

body_html:

  • Low-profile addressable head
  • EN 54-5 approved

title: System Sensor ECO1005 Heat Detector

title: System Sensor 52051E Intelligent Heat Detector

title: Fike Twinflex Multipoint Heat Detector

title: Apollo Orbis Optical/Heat Multisensor Detector

System Sensor 2251TEM addressable multi-criteria detector combining smoke and heat sensing for intelligent fire systems. Designed to detect a broader range of fire signatures while limiting false alarms.

  • Commercial loop applications

title: Apollo Discovery CO / Multisensor Detector
body_html:
